title: Verify trial cancellation flow completes with feedback
description: Test that user can complete cancellation after dismissing discount offer and provide feedback
preconditions: User clicked Cancel Anyway on discount offer

steps.description: 1. User is on discount offer pop-up
2. Click 'No thanks, cancel anyway' or dismiss offer

expected_result: Trial is cancelled, feedback-popup-viewed and feedback-submitted events fire, trial corner and homepage widget update to cancelled design, all content becomes locked
